valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sat 11 Jul 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 12 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High just west of Rockall 1030 expected Bailey 1033 by 0600 tomorrow. Low Portugal 1009 expected Biscay 1008 by same time. New low expected FitzRoy 1009 by that time
